title: Village Farms International Reports Q4 and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Full Year 2024 consolidated sales grew 18% year-over-year to $336.2 million. Cash flow from operations was $10.3 million. Net loss was $35.9 million impacted by $11.9 million goodwill impairment. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.8 million. Canadian Cannabis sales increased 32% to $204 million CAD with retail branded sales grew 23%. Achieved number 1 market share in dried flower, number 2 in pre-rolls, number 3 overall. Adjusted EBITDA was $9.4 million CAD down from $20.0 million in 2023. U.S. Cannabis sales were $17.4 million with net loss of $13.3 million including $11.9 million impairment. VF Fresh sales increased 12% to $169.2 million with net loss of $5.9 million. Q4 consolidated sales grew 11% to $82.6 million. International sales surged 113% year-over-year. Impacted by $10.5 million inventory write-down for non-flower cannabis products. 2025 Guidance: Expect international sales to triple in 2025 with five markets now receiving shipments. Leli Holland Phase II expansion expected to quintuple annual production capacity by Q4 2025. Management aims to drive profitable growth through operational optimization.
